"[9] [Appended, 14:21:21] [1] 2 VEH TC BLOCKING MIDDLE LANES // WHI SD VS UNK // ELDERLY MALE IS OO THE VEH // UNK ON INJURIES // NFI - SAG"

"[2] ^CT650 ADVD CT653 CREW IS ALREADY CHANGING PCMS'S IN THEIR AREA TO REFLECT HIGH WIND ADV "
"[1] ^CT650 ISSUING A HIGH WIND ADV FROM INKOPAH TO OCOTILLO / WILL AFFECT VEHS TRAVELING TO/FROM SAN DIEGO OVER IMPERIAL CO GRADE"
"[1] OPD ADV SIG ALERT FOR UNK DURATION "
"[3] SIG ALERT STILL IN PLACE FOR CT TO FINISH REPAIRS"
"[55] [Appended, 11:38:11] [51] ^CT B.FRAZER ADVS CONSTRUCTION CLOSURE CREW IS 1097 AND THE CLOSURE IS IN PLACE [Shared]"
"[49] [Appended, 11:38:11] [45] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1181-Trfc Collision-Minor Inj by CHP [Shared]"

"[48] [Appended, 11:38:11] [44] ^1021 CT 744 FOR INFO // HIS CREW IS 10-6 WORKING SOMETHING ELSE AND WOULD HAVE TO CALL AROUND TO GET A CLOSURE CREW // MAINT ETA WOULD BE AT LEAST AN HOUR // MAINT WILL NOT BE RESPONDING FOR CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[45] [Appended, 11:38:11] [41] ^CT B.FRAZER CALLED BACK // ADVS CONSTRUCTION CLOSURE CERW HAS AN ETA OF 60 MINS // NOT REQ CT MAINT CLSOURE AT THIS TIME // WILL CALL HIS R.E. AND ADVS [Shared]"
"[44] [Appended, 11:38:11] [40] ^1021 B.FRAZER FOR INFO // NA // LEFT MESSAGE [Shared]"
"[42] [Appended, 11:38:11] [38] ^CT OPIES LINE 35 // THIS IS CONSTRUCTION HANDLE // THEY HAVE THEIR OWN CLOSURE CREW [Shared]"
"[1] NB 805 ON TELEGRAPH CANYON OFR WILL BE CLOSED FOR UNK DURATION FOR EMERGENCY REPAIR ON THE GUARDRAIL DUE TO TC"
"[39] [Appended, 11:38:11] [35] 21 -- CT SUP ON SCENE ADV THERE NEEDS TO BE A HARD CLOSURE ON THE OFR -- AND TO ISSUE A SIG ALERT [Shared]"
"[38] [Appended, 11:38:11] [34] ^B.FRAZER CALLED BACK ADVS THEY WILL HAVE TO PUT UP A TEMP FIX FOR THE ATTENUATORS FOR NOW AND WILL REPLACE THEM TONIGHT [Shared]"
"[32] [Appended, 11:38:11] [28] ^CT COPIES LINE 26 // THIS IS CONSTRUCTION HANDLE // THEY ARE AWARE AND ARE 1097 [Shared]"
"[30] [Appended, 11:38:11] [26] [Notification] [CHP]-87-21 VIA LL - APPROX 10 YEL ATTENUATOR BINS IN THE GP THAT HAVE BEEN DESTROYED // WILL NEED TO BE A CALLOUT NB 805 ON TCR OFR [Shared]"
"[27] [Appended, 11:38:11] [23] 21 - SLOW LN AND OFR TO TCR BLOCKED [Shared]"
"[24] [Appended, 11:38:11] [20] [Notification] [FSP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141Enrt by FSP [Shared]"
"[22] [Appended, 11:38:11] [18] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1183-Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt by CHP [Shared]"
"[20] [Appended, 11:38:11] [16] [Notification] [CHP]-BLK DODG RAM 1500 REQ 1141 // MOTHER IN LAW IS HAVING CHEST PAINS -- 1039 MCC [Shared]"
"[13] [Appended, 11:38:11] [9] [Appended, 06:52:38] [4] NB 805 JSO L ST BLK PK ON RS "
"[12] [Appended, 11:38:11] [13] [Appended, 06:52:40] [1] SOLO VEH TC // DARK GRY OR BLK PK TC'D INTO RS HIT SOME CONSTRUCTION EQUIPMENT THAT WAS ON RS"
"[11] [Appended, 11:38:11] [8] [Appended, 06:52:38] [3] BOTH VEHS WERE TRYING TO RUN EACH OTHER OFF THE ROAD PRIOR TO TC "
"[9] [Appended, 11:38:11] [6] [Appended, 06:52:38] [1] VIC; BLK PK ON RS TC'D GUARD RAIL "

Log.Location: "Proctor Valley Rd / San Miguel Ranch Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[10] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CHAINS-Chain Control to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CLOSURE of a Road to 1125-Traffic Hazard by CHP"
"[3] TRAFFIC CONTROL IS SET UP FOR WHEN CLOSURE IS IN PLACE -- JUST NEED OFCR AND CT TO SET UP CLOSURE"
"[2] WATER MAIN BROKE ON THE BRIDGE JSO SAN MIGUEL RANCH ROAD -- NEED ROAD CLOSURE FROM SAN MIGUEL TO BONITA MEADOWS LANE "
"[1] [Intersection: Proctor Valley Rd / San Miguel Ranch Rd] [Medium] [Information] BORDERLINE CALL, ROLL CHP AND START CVPD FOR BORDERLINE"
"[3] TC'D W/ TIRE DEBRIS, UNK IF 1125"
"[2] [2] ^CT650 ADVD CT653 CREW IS ALREADY CHANGING PCMS'S IN THEIR AREA TO REFLECT HIGH WIND ADV [Shared]"
"[1] [1] ^CT650 ISSUING A HIGH WIND ADV FROM INKOPAH TO OCOTILLO / WILL AFFECT VEHS TRAVELING TO/FROM SAN DIEGO OVER IMPERIAL CO GRADE[Shared]"
"[50] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1180-Trfc Collision-Major Inj by CHP [Shared]"
"[22] 85-S1 NEED A COMMERCIAL FOR INSP[ECTION OF VEH"
"[16] ECPD ADV INVOLVED ITS CRandR GARBAGE TK CA/71652H3 // VEH WAS IN MOTION WHEN MALE FELL OUT"
"[3] ON THE SIDE OF THE RD "
"[10] A76-086 VEH RLSD TO LAST 27 RAN"
